title: Eye Slack Thread — Live Streaming Structure & CCABot Slot Design
desc: Eye posts a single Slack thread as a live dashboard. Thread slot contract: root=status(앱봇아이), [0]=card placeholder(앱봇아이), [1]=CCABot mouse+CCA analysis. Slot [0] ALWAYS force-created so CCABot reliably lands at [1]. Update-only policy minimizes message count (Slack 90-day free plan limit).
steps: [THREAD-CONTRACT] Fixed slot layout: root=앱봇아이 status (🟢 Eye alive PID/uptime/mem/frame). [0]=앱봇아이 card reply (IPC summary / active card content). [1]=CCABot mouse+CCA live analysis. Thread reused across restarts — never post new root if existing 앱봇아이 msg found (FindEyeStatusTsForReuse).

[SLOT-GUARANTEE] Reply [0] MUST always exist after new thread creation. If IPC summary empty at startup → post '_(loading...)_' placeholder (username=앱봇아이). Without this: CCABot occupies [0], index-based lookup fails, duplicate CCABot replies accumulate forever. Code: AppBotEyeGlobalMode.cs frameCount==0 block.

[CCABOT-REUSE] CCABot reply reuse: search by username=='CCABot' via FirstOrDefault — NOT by index. Bug history: children[1] hardcoded → fails when card slot absent or thread has extra replies. _mouseCcaReplyTs holds ts; UpdateMouseCcaSlack() edits in-place via SlackUpdateMessageAsync(). New post only when ts==null.

[STARTUP-RECOVERY] Eye restart with existing thread: FindEyeStatusTsForReuse() finds root by username. SlackGetThreadRepliesAsync() recovers child ts values: filter username=앱봇아이 → children[0]=_eyeSummaryReplyTs. CCABot ts recovered in UnifiedAnalysisLoop by username search. RestoreHoverReplyTs() applied when found.

[UPDATE-ONLY] All live content (card, CCABot) uses chat.update (edit in-place) not new posts. Change-detection (_lastMouseCcaResult) skips Slack update when content unchanged. Purpose: conserve Slack message quota — free plan 90-day history cap means accumulated posts burn through workspace lifetime fast.

[BUG-HISTORY] Root cause: _cachedIpcSummary empty at startup timing → if(summary.Length>0) skipped [0] creation → CCABot wrote to [0] → next restart children[1] found nothing → new CCABot reply posted → loop. Fix: always create [0] with fallback text; CCABot recovery uses username search not position.
author: claude
